executive_summary: Latest updates from 2 sources covering the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Monitoring 2 key developments. AI analysis refreshing shortly.
execSummaryRich: Escalation: HIGH. Key developments: Pakistan hosts talks with Saudi, Turkey, Egypt to push Iran war de-escalation. Israeli PM says ordered military to ‘further expand’ security zone in Lebanon. Situation remains active.

key_developments.headline: Pakistan hosts talks with Saudi, Turkey, Egypt to push Iran war de-escalation
key_developments.detail: Pakistan says it is stepping up diplomatic efforts to halt the widening Israeli-US war on Iran, hosting regional powers for urgent talks in Islamabad. Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar said Pakistan, Saudi Arabia, Turkey and Egypt explored "possible ways to bring an early and permanent end to the war" in t
key_developments.fullAnalysis: Pakistan says it is stepping up diplomatic efforts to halt the widening Israeli-US war on Iran, hosting regional powers for urgent talks in Islamabad. terminology_explained.simple_explanation: Iran's elite Revolutionary Guard — controls missiles and drones.
Narrow waterway — 20% of world oil passes through it.

what_to_watch_next: Monitor live feeds for breaking developments.

india_impact.headline: India Monitors Gulf Conflict
india_impact.detail: India's energy security tied to Gulf stability.
india_impact.full_detail: India imports 85% of crude oil from Gulf. Strait of Hormuz disruption would immediately impact supply.

indiaSummary: India continues to monitor the US-Israel-Iran conflict closely given its significant dependence on Gulf energy imports and the large Indian diaspora. Oil price volatility directly impacts petrol prices for Indian consumers.
